objects.glass_bottle: a glass bottle -- fragile, light, needs a low grip force
objects.steel_bolt: a steel bolt -- rugged, light, fine with a high grip force
objects.ceramic_mug: a ceramic mug -- fragile, light-to-medium weight
objects.rice_bag: a bag of rice -- rugged, medium weight, doesn't care about grip force
objects.raw_egg: a raw egg -- extremely fragile, very light
